# Strait CLI

> Command-line interface for the Strait job orchestration platform

Strait CLI is the primary interface for the Strait job orchestration platform. 55+ commands for managing jobs, runs, workflows, secrets, and orchestration.

## Docs

- [Installation](getting-started/installation.mdx)
- [Quickstart](getting-started/quickstart.mdx)
- [Authentication](getting-started/authentication.mdx)
- [Configuration](guides/configuration.mdx)
- [Deployment](guides/deployment.mdx)
- [Declarative GitOps](guides/gitops.mdx)
- [CI/CD Integration](guides/ci-cd.mdx)
- [Local Development](guides/local-development.mdx)
- [Monitoring and Diagnostics](guides/monitoring.mdx)
- [Logs and Events](guides/logs-and-events.mdx)
- [Interactive Features](guides/interactive.mdx): TUI dashboard, wizards, interactive editor
- [Scripting and Automation](guides/scripting.mdx): exit codes, JSON piping, CI mode, bash patterns
- [Extensions](guides/extensions.mdx)
- [Security and Credentials](guides/security.mdx): keyring storage, key rotation, stdin auth
- [Examples and Recipes](guides/examples.mdx): real-world end-to-end workflows
- [Upgrading](guides/upgrading.mdx)
- [Error Reference](guides/errors.mdx): common errors with causes and fixes
- [Troubleshooting](guides/troubleshooting.mdx)

## CLI Reference

- [Overview](cli-reference/index.mdx)
- [Global Flags](cli-reference/global-flags.mdx)
- [Output Formats](cli-reference/output-formats.mdx)
- [Environment Variables](cli-reference/environment-variables.mdx): every env var the CLI reads
- [Config File Reference](cli-reference/config-files.mdx): config.yaml, .strait.yaml, strait.json schema
- [Manifest Schema](cli-reference/manifest-schema.mdx): declarative YAML schema for jobs, workflows, api-keys
- [Run Statuses](cli-reference/run-statuses.mdx): status lifecycle, terminal vs active, filter values
- [API Scopes](cli-reference/scopes.mdx): all permission scopes for API keys
- [Cron Expressions](cli-reference/cron.mdx): cheatsheet for --cron schedules
- [auth](cli-reference/auth.mdx): login, logout, whoami, auth status
- [jobs](cli-reference/jobs.mdx): list, get, create, update, delete, clone, trigger, health, versions, dependencies, add-dependency, batch
- [job-groups](cli-reference/job-groups.mdx): list, get, create, update, delete, jobs, pause, resume, stats
- [runs](cli-reference/runs.mdx): list, get, watch, cancel, replay, logs, reschedule, dlq, dlq-replay, outputs, tool-calls, checkpoints
- [workflows](cli-reference/workflows.mdx): list, get, create, update, delete, clone, trigger, dry-run, plan, simulate, versions, diff, policy, visualize
- [workflow-runs](cli-reference/workflow-runs.mdx): list, get, steps, watch, cancel, pause, resume, retry, step actions
- [sync](cli-reference/sync.mdx): sync strait.json jobs and workflows
- [deploy](cli-reference/deploy.mdx): deprecated compatibility alias for sync
- [secrets](cli-reference/secrets.mdx): list, create, delete, local set, local get
- [api-keys](cli-reference/api-keys.mdx): list, create, rotate, revoke
- [triggers](cli-reference/triggers.mdx): list, get, send, purge
- [notifications](cli-reference/notifications.mdx): list, get, create, update, delete
- [team](cli-reference/team.mdx): list, add, remove, roles
- [audit](cli-reference/audit.mdx): view audit log events
- [config](cli-reference/config.mdx): edit, path
- [context](cli-reference/context.mdx): create, use, list, current
- [logs / events / send](cli-reference/logs.mdx): logs, events, send
- [dev](cli-reference/dev.mdx): local tunnel and endpoint registration
- [ci](cli-reference/ci.mdx): setup, check
- [tui](cli-reference/tui.mdx): interactive terminal dashboard
- [api](cli-reference/api.mdx): raw REST API calls
- [project](cli-reference/project.mdx): export, import
- [backup](cli-reference/backup.mdx): create, restore
- [fixtures](cli-reference/fixtures.mdx): create, clean
- [utilities](cli-reference/utilities.mdx): doctor, diagnose, verify, cleanup, top, trace, perf, stats, listen, wait, drain, and more
